title: Scorching Nether
description: Scorching Nether is a mod partially inspired by Minecraft Dungeons that aims to improve the Nether by introducing new content.
body:
![scorching nether banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d03a52da691a4e2a8585e1db5de31d73432a0f1f_0.webp)**Scorching Nether** is a mod that aims to improve upon Vanilla's Nether Update.

The mod reworks existing biomes by using both custom content aswell as parts from Minecraft Dungeons.

Currently the mod reworks the following:

**Warped Forest**

The Warped Forest has received a brand new overhaul. Warped Fungi now have vines and hanging vines aswell as roots growing on them. Their stems are now overgrown with Warped Nylium. The Nether Roof in the Warped Forest is now overgrown with Warped Weeping Vines and a new food source, the Warped Grapes which can be harvested from Turquouise Pendents.

**Crimson Forest**

The Crimson Forest is now much more vibrant, having more roots, more grass and more vines. It is abundant with Thontus Thistle - a new plant that carries the new Thontus Berries.

**Soul Sand Valley**

Soul Eterns, Spirit Danglers and Chains now hang from the ceiling of the Soul Sand Valley. Bone Spikes, Souldew and Sprouts can be found throughout the valley.
This project is not associated with Mojang Studios, though some of its assets belong to them.
